campaign: MarbMarket — The First veDEX on MegaETH is Launching
mission: Explain the veDEX Model & Why MarbMarket Matters
best_content:
Most DEXes fight for liquidity. MarbMarket flips the script—letting liquidity providers vote for rewards. First veDEX on MegaETH, no VCs, no presale. Pure community power.

Here's how it works: lock MARB tokens → gain voting power → weekly votes determine which LP pools get MARB emissions. Projects can "bribe" for votes with extra incentives. Your lock duration = your influence.

The beauty? Longer locks mean more rewards AND more say. ve(3,3) model in action. MARB lockers direct emissions → LPs get rewards → protocols pay bribes → incentives flow back to lockers. Positive feedback loop.

This isn't just another DEX. It's a governance experiment. Community decides winners. No central authority. Just code, votes, and rewards.

Check the launch: x.com/Marb_market

@RallyOnChain what veDEX mechanics would you most want to see implemented on your favorite chains?
qa_comments: Love how this puts power back in the community's hands! The ve(3,3) model seems like a brilliant way to align incentives across all participants. No VCs and no presale is exactly what DeFi needs more of.

The "bribe" mechanism is particularly interesting - creates a healthy competition between projects while rewarding liquidity providers. This feedback loop could really revolutionize how DEXs distribute rewards.
Excited to see how this plays out on MegaETH! The community-governed approach feels like the natural evolution of decentralized finance. Would love to see this model expand to other chains.
